creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #1)

Having the Lua filter available is just handy. Especially that upstream ships with it enabled by default.

I have to agree, however, that the conflict is rather significant.

Let's keep the option off for now. Spend a moment poking around the code base and using an external luajit is not immediately straightforward.
